	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_3_9250292_1447254962262_940794_17303' base_Class='_18_3_9250292_1447254962262_498646_17302' Text='The vehicle shall drive at least 1000 km on hybrid mode.' Id='SR9.3'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1438687457217_903511_15850' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1438687457217_473887_15849' Text='ACC shall bring the vehicle to a complete stop if the barrier appears.' Id='SR4'/>

The wheels shall transfer kinetic energy via the drivetrain to the generator.&#10;Generator resistance produced from the electricity created shall slow the vehicle.' Id='SR2'/>

	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329576794_721714_16943' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329576794_922215_16942' Text='The vehicle shall drive at least 200 km on full charge electric-only propulsion mode and shall be charged in less than 150 minutes.' Id='SR9.1'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2_8c4028a_1440488147790_664238_19254' base_Class='_18_2_8c4028a_1440488147789_113942_19253' Text='The vehicle shall completely stop from 100 km per hour in less than 30 meters.' Id='SR3.1'/>
	<sysml:DeriveReqt xmi:id='_18_3beta_9250292_1447328741152_239074_48145' base_Abstraction='_18_3beta_9250292_1447328741151_96095_48144'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329491475_475645_16927' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329491475_437173_16926' Id='UN6'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2_8c4028a_1444997461513_366212_17721' base_Class='_18_2_8c4028a_1444997461513_499742_17720' Text='The total vehicle mass shall not exceed 1500 Kg.' Id='SR6'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1438612690773_461610_15513' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1438612690773_871468_15512' Text='The Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) shall control acceleration and braking of the vehicle. ACC shall detect traffic slowing ahead and automatically reduce speed to match. ' Id='SR1'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2_8c4028a_1440489104410_429359_19313' base_Class='_18_2_8c4028a_1440489104410_682496_19312' Text='Friction braking at 100 km per hour shall not generate more than 55 kW of heat at each wheel.' Id='SR3.2'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433333693326_371254_17030' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433333693326_838144_17029' Text='It should be comfortable seating for 5 passengers.' Id='UN8.2'/>
	<sysml:DeriveReqt xmi:id='_18_2_8c4028a_1444997483510_803774_17757' base_Abstraction='_18_2_8c4028a_1444997483509_370200_17756'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329833888_25544_16967' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329833873_235537_16966' Text='I want to plug the vehicle into my house current and charge it. ' Id='UN2.2'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329772714_877516_16959' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329772713_329056_16958' Text='The vehicle&#39;s battery should be charging while braking.' Id='UN2.1'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1438685843867_276379_15770' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1438685843866_540828_15769' Text='These requirements describe the cooperative regenerative braking system safety requirements.' Id='SR3'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433334644400_538499_17078' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433334644399_573100_17077' Text='All the car dashboard controls should be placed in a logical, clear and ergonomic way.' Id='UN8'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433334681960_464790_17086' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433334681959_393121_17085' Text='The vehicle should allow to set a desired speed.' Id='UN4'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329603552_920172_16951' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329603552_154190_16950' Id='UN2'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_3_9250292_1447255982394_32604_17389' base_Class='_18_3_9250292_1447255982393_606426_17388' Text='It should be possible to drive at least 1000km.' Id='UN7'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433334431250_326435_17046' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433334431249_11079_17045' Text='The hybrid vehicle shall have the braking capability of a typical SUV.' Id='UN5'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329432180_487522_16919' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433329432180_516258_16918' Text='The vehicle should achieve at last 4,5 star Euro NCAP safety rating.' Id='UN10'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433331976112_282579_16991' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433331976112_847201_16990' Id='SR7' Text='Requirements of distances on different modes'/>
	<sysml:Requirement xmi:id='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433333670650_691674_17022' base_Class='_18_2beta_8c4028a_1433333670650_146087_17021' Text='Overall cargo space should be the best in the SUV class.' Id='UN8.1'/>
